MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Continued To May-13-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 504

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Richard Podoll, Podoll & Podoll P. C.'s motion to compel production of documents is ordered off calendar for failure to comply with California Rule of Court 3.1020. The Court notes that the requests are overbroad and orders the parties to meet and confer as to narrowing the scope of the requests to those documents that concern the underlying fee dispute. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-21-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
